SocialHub.title: Social Media Hub
SocialHub.subtitle: Pamahalaan ang iyong mga koneksyon at post sa social media.
SocialHub.connect_meta_desc: Ikonekta ang iyong mga page at propesyonal na account para mag-post nang direkta. Siguraduhing naka-link ang iyong propesyonal na Instagram account sa isang Facebook page.
SocialHub.connect_tiktok_desc: Ikonekta ang iyong TikTok account para mag-schedule at mag-publish ng mga video nang direkta.
SocialHub.beta_alert: Ang direktang integrasyon sa Instagram at TikTok ay kasalukuyang nasa development at platform approval (Private Beta). Ang feature ay malapit nang ma-roll out sa publiko.

LandingPage.hero_h1_seo: Rive — AI-Powered na Restaurant Management Software
LandingPage.hero_bg_alt: Professional fine dining kitchen with team in service
LandingPage.philosophy_bg_alt: Organic texture of a fine dining restaurant interior
LandingPage.hero_description: Algorithmic na katalinuhan para sa iyong kapayapaan ng isip. Pasimplehin ang regulatory compliance at hayaan ang Rive AI Ecosystem na ma-anticipate ang iyong operasyon, mag-scan ng mga invoice, at mag-track ng iyong Food Cost.
LandingPage.features_card1_desc: Sinusuri ng AI ang iyong mga temperature log at nagmumungkahi ng solusyon para sa mga anomalya, na ive-validate ng iyong team.
LandingPage.features_card2_desc: Matalinong pagbabasa ng mga tala ng iyong service staff.
LandingPage.features_card3_desc: Ang interface ay agad na nag-a-adapt sa katutubong wika ng iyong kitchen brigade.
LandingPage.philosophy_intro: Ang pagpapatakbo ng restaurant ngayon ay kadalasang nangangahulugan ng pag-navigate sa hindi mahuhulaan na bagyo nang walang maaasahang instrumento.
LandingPage.philosophy_vision: Higit pa sa isang tool, ang Rive ang iyong mahalagang compass para i-optimize ang bawat desisyon.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_desc: Hindi pinapalitan ng Rive ang iyong expertise — pinapalakas nito gamit ang data.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_title: Makita ang halaga ng hindi pagkilos
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_desc: Bawat nawawalang data point ay may presyo. Ginagawang visible ito ng Rive.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar3_desc: Mas marami kang i-calibrate, mas maraming natututunan ng iyong sistema. Ito ang iyong katalinuhan, hindi amin.
LandingPage.hero_loss_hook: Bawat araw na walang data ay hindi nakikitang sayang.
LandingPage.calculator_title: Magkano ang nagagastos sa iyo ng kawalan ng kasiguraduhan?
LandingPage.calculator_subtitle: I-estimate ang halaga ng overproduction nang walang maaasahang data.
LandingPage.social_proof_banner: Dinisenyo para sa fine dining sa Quebec
LandingPage.protocol_desc: Mula sa koneksyon hanggang sa calibrated na piloting.
LandingPage.protocol_phase1_desc: Isang pindutan, at magsisimulang matuto ang Rive ng iyong ritmo.
LandingPage.protocol_phase2_desc: Ang iyong nakaraang sales ay magiging per-item na prediction.
LandingPage.protocol_phase3_desc: 30 segundo ng feedback bawat araw at aabot sa 92% accuracy ang iyong sistema.
LandingPage.footer_desc: Algorithmic na katalinuhan para sa mga gastronomic na restaurant.
LandingPage.footer_rights: © 2026 Rive. Lahat ng karapatan ay nakalaan.
LandingPage.features_card1_ai_suggestion: Suriin ang compressor at ilipat agad ang mga karne.
LandingPage.features_card3_source_text: Linisin ang cold zone ng mga fridge
LandingPage.features_card3_target_text: Limpiar la zona fría de las neveras
LandingPage.features_title: Lahat ng instrumento na kailangan mo para mag-navigate, sa isang lugar.
LandingPage.f1_desc: Kalimutan ang mga maluwag na notebook. Mga turnover, equipment issue, at crew incident — nire-record, nima-map, at trina-track ng AI.
LandingPage.f1_ex1: Mag-log ng equipment storm (hal., "Nale-leak ang Fridge 2, tinawagan na ang mechanic").
LandingPage.f1_ex2: Magpasa ng tumpak na navigational instruction sa gabi na crew.
LandingPage.f1_ex3: I-track ang mga guest incident para i-adjust ang direksyon.
LandingPage.f2_desc: Tinutulungan ka ng Rive na makita ang mga anomalya sa temperatura at proseso, nagba-balangkas ng corrective course para maiwasan ang compliance rocks.
LandingPage.f2_ex1: Umabot sa 8°C ang fridge: mungkahi ng corrective action "Ihiwalay o itapon ang high-risk food".
LandingPage.f2_ex2: Automatic na paalala para sa fryer oil checks.
LandingPage.f2_ex3: Naka-document na HACCP procedure sa kaso ng inspeksyon.
LandingPage.f3_title: Instant na Pagsasalin sa 54 na Wika
LandingPage.f3_desc: Wala na ang language barrier. Bawat miyembro ay nag-a-access sa app at mga tala sa kanilang katutubong wika.
LandingPage.f3_ex1: Ang chef ay nagsusulat sa Spanish, ang dishwasher ay nagbabasa sa Bengali.
LandingPage.f3_ex2: Agad na naiintindihan ng lahat ng bagong hire ang recipe card.
LandingPage.f3_ex3: Naka-acquire ang safety procedure anuman ang pinagmulan ng empleyado.
LandingPage.integrations_banner: Nag-i-integrate nang native sa iyong POS system: Toast, Square, SumUp, Stripe, Lightspeed, Zettle...
LandingPage.f4_desc: Ang iyong Profit Radar ay kumo-konekta sa iyong POS para i-cross-reference ang sales volume sa mga gastos sa real-time. I-maximize ang iyong mga margin nang autonomous.
LandingPage.f4_ex1: Automatic na i-import ang iyong mga benta mula sa Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, o Lightspeed.
LandingPage.f4_ex2: Tukuyin ang "Stars" vs "Rocks" na pagkain gamit ang matalinong Performance Matrix.
LandingPage.f4_ex3: Hindi compatible ang sistema? Nag-pa-parse at nag-i-import nang native ang AI ng Rive ng kahit anong CSV export.
LandingPage.f5_desc: Itigil na ang manual na pag-enter ng mga invoice. I-extract ng AI ang mga line item, produkto, at dami para i-update ang iyong net cost.
LandingPage.f5_ex1: Kunan ng larawan ang gusot na invoice ng supplier sa delivery.
LandingPage.f5_ex2: Granular na line-by-line extraction at price variation alert para sa mga sangkap.
LandingPage.f5_ex3: Live at automatic na update ng Food Cost ng iyong mga recipe.
LandingPage.f6_desc: Maakit ang bagong mga kliyente gamit ang mga engaging post ng iyong culinary highlight na na-generate sa isang click.
LandingPage.f6_ex1: Mag-generate ng captivating caption para sa Valentine's Day menu na may perfect na emoji.
LandingPage.f6_ex2: Automatic na isalin ang iyong mga post para maakit ang international na kliyente.
LandingPage.f6_ex3: Mag-draft ng nakakatuksong description para sa iyong delivery platform (UberEats, Deliveroo).
LandingPage.f7_desc: I-sync ang lahat ng client reservation mula sa Libro, Resy, at Zenchef. Webhooks at automatic polling para sa real-time na update.
LandingPage.f7_ex1: Tumanggap ng online reservation agad nang walang manual na entry.
LandingPage.f7_ex2: I-consolidate ang mga darating na guest, cancellation, at no-show sa isang central na view.
LandingPage.f7_ex3: I-cross-reference ang data ng kliyente para ma-anticipate ang iyong service volume.
LandingPage.f8_desc: Ang Sonar Analysis ay nag-cross-reference ng iyong mga darating na passenger, sales current, at mapa para automatic na mag-generate ng prep course.
LandingPage.f8_ex1: Kalkulahin ang ration para sa bawat pagkain batay sa eksaktong nakumpirmang passenger.
LandingPage.f8_ex2: I-aggregate ang mga hilaw na sangkap na kailangan para sa paparating na ekspedisyon.
LandingPage.f8_ex3: I-estimate ang kabuuang gastos sa cargo bago pa man magtaas ng layag.
LandingPage.f1_mock_entry1: Nale-leak ang Fridge 2, tinawagan na ang repairman
LandingPage.f1_mock_ai_task: ✨ AI: Na-create ang task na "Tawagan ang plumber"
LandingPage.f6_mock_caption: Tuklasin ang espesyal na menu ngayong gabi! Isang perpektong seared bluefin tuna... ✨ Reservation sa bio 👇
LandingPage.tier_essential_desc: Ang matibay na hull at ecosystem para i-structure ang iyong pang-araw-araw na operasyon.
LandingPage.tier_performance_desc: Ang iyong Profit Radar para i-chart ang pinaka-kumikitang mga kurso at margin.
LandingPage.tier_intelligence_desc: Deep Profit Topography na may mga prediction para autonomously na i-steer ang fleet.
LandingPage.f9_desc: Tumpak na tracking para sa mga likido. Pamahalaan ang keg yield, i-track ang glass deposit nang hiwalay, at mag-operate ng buong micro-brewery production kanban.
LandingPage.f9_ex1: Agad na ihiwalay ang bottle at keg deposit mula sa iyong tunay na Food Cost.
LandingPage.f9_ex2: I-track ang eksaktong pour loss (variance) sa pagitan ng POS sales at physical inventory count.
LandingPage.f9_ex3: Pamahalaan ang iyong mga beer batch mula sa fermentation hanggang kegging na may specific na yield.

Pricing.title: Malinaw na presyo, tunay na epekto.
Pricing.subtitle: Magsimula nang libre, mag-upgrade kapag handa ka na.
Pricing.badge_free: Magsimula nang libre — walang kailangan na credit card
Pricing.tier_essential_desc: Ang matibay na hull at ecosystem para i-structure ang iyong pang-araw-araw na operasyon.
Pricing.tier_performance_desc: Ang iyong Profit Radar para i-chart ang pinaka-kumikitang mga kurso at margin.
Pricing.tier_enterprise_desc: Multi-site na piloting na may dedikadong technical support.
Pricing.tier_intelligence_desc: Deep Profit Topography na may mga prediction para autonomously na i-steer ang fleet.
Pricing.waste_calculator_title: Magkano ang nagagastos sa iyo ng kasalukuyang sayang?
Pricing.waste_calculator_subtitle: I-estimate ang overproduction nang walang maaasahang data.
Pricing.enterprise_custom_desc: Consolidated na dashboard, multi-site, custom na deployment, at training.
Pricing.features_title: Lahat ng instrumento na kailangan mo para mag-navigate, sa isang lugar.

Auth.signup_card_desc: I-setup ang iyong restaurant sa 30 segundo
Auth.error_empty: Pakipunan ang lahat ng field (password: minimum 6 na karakter)
Auth.error_confirm: Aktibo pa rin ang 'Confirm email' setting sa Supabase. I-disable ito sa Authentication > Providers > Email para mag-test nang walang email validation.
Auth.terms_agreement: Sa pagsa-signup, pumapayag ka sa aming

Dashboard.setup_menu_desc: Magdagdag ng mga pagkain para i-unlock ang Performance Matrix.
Dashboard.setup_pos_desc: I-synchronize ang iyong mga benta para sa real-time na pagsusuri.
Dashboard.setup_team_desc: I-share ang access sa Logbook at ikonekta ang iyong mga team.
Dashboard.setup_completed: Tapos na ang initial deployment. Lahat ng sistema ay operational.

TrialModal.title: 100% Libreng Trial
TrialModal.description_before: Gumawa ng iyong restaurant workspace sa 30 segundo.
TrialModal.description_after: I-access ang lahat ng Rive AI feature na may generous na quota.
TrialModal.cta_free: Gawin ang aking workspace nang libre →
TrialModal.footer_note: Magsisimula lang ang bayad kapag naubos na ang iyong mga libreng credit.

Instagram.title: 📸 Instagram Generator
Instagram.subtitle: Mag-generate ng kumpletong post gamit ang AI
Instagram.desc: Mag-ge-generate ang Rive ng buong Instagram post na may caption, hashtag, at call-to-action, na naka-tailor sa classification ng iyong pagkain.
Instagram.btn_loading: Kino-compose ng AI ang iyong post...
Instagram.quota_desc: Na-generate mo na ang iyong {count} na libreng post. Mag-upgrade sa Performance.

Logbook.title: Ang Logbook ng Kapitan
Logbook.placeholder: Bawat serbisyo ay isang paglalakbay. Ano ang nangyari ngayon? Nima-map ng AI ang iyong salaysay...
Logbook.quota_desc: Na-analyze mo na ang iyong {count} na libreng tala. Mag-upgrade sa Performance.
Logbook.scan_quota_desc: Naabot na ang quota ({count} na scan). Mag-upgrade sa Enterprise.
Logbook.empty_state: No notes yet. Add your first observation.

MenuEditor.title: 🍽️ Menu Manager
MenuEditor.desc: I-edit ang iyong menu dito — agad na nare-reflect ang mga pagbabago sa iyong QR code at mini-site.
MenuEditor.btn_show_qr: 📱 Ipakita ang QR Code para i-print

MenuEngineering.title: 🧭 Performance Matrix — Menu Performance
MenuEngineering.desc_full: Mag-generate ng detalyadong Profit Topography ng iyong Menu Ecosystem na nag-cross ng iyong mga presyo, gastos, at popularity para matuklasan ang iyong Stars at Rocks.
MenuEngineering.desc_short: Automatic na classification ng iyong mga pagkain ayon sa popularity at profitability.
MenuEngineering.quota_desc: Na-generate mo na ang iyong {count} na libreng analysis. Mag-upgrade sa Performance.

CGU.title: Terms of Service — Rive
CGU.s1_p1: Rive is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform designed to **assist** restaurant owners, managers, and food-service professionals in their daily operations through AI-powered tools and data-driven insights. The service is accessible at **rivehub.com**.
CGU.s1_p2: The platform provides, among others, the following features:
CGU.s1_l1: **Digital logbook** — AI-powered service note logging, automatic classification, urgency detection, and corrective action suggestions
CGU.s1_l2: **Temperature monitoring** — Recording, trend analysis, and HACCP-compliant corrective action recommendations
CGU.s1_l3: **Menu management** — Menu creation, editing, and publishing with QR code generation and public mini-site
CGU.s1_l4: **Food cost analysis** — Automated margin calculation per dish, ingredient and supplier management, price tracking, and profitability alerts
CGU.s1_l5: **Menu engineering** — BCG-matrix classification of menu items (Star, Anchor, Drift, Rock) with AI-generated strategic recommendations
CGU.s1_l6: **Receipt and invoice digitization (OCR)** — AI vision model-powered optical recognition to extract data from invoices and receipts
CGU.s1_l7: **Smart prep lists** — Automatic generation based on reservations, historical sales data, and recipes
CGU.s1_l8: **Reservation management** — Multi-platform synchronization and guest volume forecasting
CGU.s1_l9: **Social media hub** — AI content generation for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok
CGU.s1_l10: **Variance and loss tracking** — Theoretical vs. actual comparison, waste documentation, and corrective actions
CGU.s1_l11: **Deposits and revenue tracking** — Daily revenue recording and bank reconciliation
CGU.s1_l12: **Accounting dashboard (Le Nid)** — Financial intelligence, net margin estimation, and cash flow visualization
CGU.s1_l13: **Utility cost tracking** — Electricity and water consumption monitoring
CGU.s1_p3: Rive is a **decision-support tool**. It does not replace professional judgment, human expertise, or the user's regulatory obligations under any circumstances.
CGU.s2_p1: In these terms, the following words have the meanings set out below:
CGU.s2_d1_def: The Rive platform accessible at rivehub.com, including all its features, APIs, and associated applications.
CGU.s2_d2_def: Any natural or legal person who has created an account on the platform and accepted these terms.
CGU.s2_d3_def: The food-service establishment registered by the User within the Service, constituting the primary workspace.
CGU.s2_d4_def: Language model (LLM) and vision model technologies provided by third-party suppliers (notably Anthropic / Claude), integrated into the Service for analysis, content generation, and data extraction.
CGU.s2_d5_def: Any connection between the Service and an external platform (POS system, reservation platform, social network) via APIs or webhooks.
CGU.s2_d6_def: Optical character recognition — technology for extracting text and data from document images.
CGU.s2_d7_def: All information entered, imported, or generated by the User within the Service, including notes, menus, recipes, images, transactions, and configurations.
CGU.s2_d8_def: A numerical indicator reflecting the calibration level and data completeness of the restaurant within the platform.
CGU.s3_s1_p1: Access to the Service requires creating an account with a valid email address. The User agrees to provide accurate information and keep it up to date.
CGU.s3_s2_p1: The User is solely responsible for keeping login credentials confidential. Any activity carried out under the User's account is deemed to have been performed by the User. In the event of a suspected compromise, the User must notify Rive without delay.
CGU.s3_s3_p1: The account owner may invite team members to join the restaurant workspace. Available roles are:
CGU.s3_s3_l1: **Owner** — Full access, subscription management, inviting and removing members
CGU.s3_s3_l2: **Manager** — Access to operational modules and restaurant configuration
CGU.s3_s3_l3: **Team member** — Read and input access based on enabled modules
CGU.s3_s3_p2: The account owner is responsible for actions performed by team members within the Service.
CGU.s3_s4_p1: A 14-day free trial is offered without a credit card. After this period, a paid subscription is required to continue using premium features. Data entered during the trial is retained.
CGU.s4_p1: Rive allows connections to external services to enhance its capabilities. The User acknowledges that these integrations depend on services operated by independent third parties.
CGU.s4_s1_p1: The Service supports synchronization with the following POS systems:
CGU.s4_s1_p2: Transaction data imported through these integrations is used for food cost analysis, menu engineering, and prep forecasting.
CGU.s4_s2_p2: Reservation data is used for guest volume forecasting and prep list generation.
CGU.s4_s3_p1: The Service enables connections to the following platforms for content publishing:
CGU.s4_s3_p2: The User authorizes Rive to publish content on their behalf only after explicit approval of each publication.
CGU.s4_s4_p1: Rive shall not be held liable for interruptions, API changes, data inaccuracies, or malfunctions attributable to third-party services. The User is responsible for maintaining valid integration credentials and verifying the consistency of synchronized data.
CGU.s5_s1_p1: The Service integrates artificial intelligence technologies (LLM and vision models) provided by third-party suppliers (Anthropic / Claude). These technologies are used to:
CGU.s5_s1_l1: Analyze and categorize logbook service notes
CGU.s5_s1_l2: Suggest corrective actions when anomalies are detected (temperatures, operations)
CGU.s5_s1_l3: Translate content across supported languages (25 languages)
CGU.s5_s1_l4: Extract data from receipt and invoice images (OCR)
CGU.s5_s1_l5: Generate text content and captions for social media
CGU.s5_s1_l7: Generate prep lists based on historical and forecast data
CGU.s5_s1_l8: Analyze food costs and profitability margins
CGU.s5_s1_l9: Estimate financial indicators in the accounting dashboard
CGU.s5_s2_p1: **Suggestions, analyses, and content generated by the artificial intelligence integrated into Rive are provided for informational and indicative purposes only.** The User acknowledges and accepts that:
CGU.s5_s2_l1: AI suggestions **do not constitute professional advice** in matters of food safety, regulatory compliance, accounting, public health, or any other discipline.
CGU.s5_s2_l2: AI suggestions **do not replace** the judgment of a qualified professional (health inspector, certified accountant, culinary expert).
CGU.s5_s2_l3: AI may produce **inaccurate, incomplete, or inappropriate results** due to the probabilistic nature of language models.
CGU.s5_s2_l4: **Final responsibility for all operational decisions** — including corrective actions, financial decisions, content publications, and compliance measures — **rests solely with the User**.
CGU.s5_s2_l5: Rive **does not guarantee regulatory compliance** of the establishment. The Service is designed to *facilitate* management, not guarantee it.
CGU.s5_s3_l1: **Verify and validate** all AI-generated suggestions before applying them to operations
CGU.s5_s3_l2: **Not rely exclusively** on AI suggestions for decisions affecting food safety, public health, or the financial position of the establishment
CGU.s5_s3_l3: **Maintain the regulatory skills and training** required for staff, regardless of Service usage
CGU.s5_s3_l4: **Report** any clearly inappropriate or potentially dangerous suggestion to the Rive team via the support form
CGU.s5_s4_p1: AI-generated translations are provided for reference only. Rive does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or appropriateness of translations, particularly for safety-related communications. Users are encouraged to have critical instructions verified by a qualified native speaker.
CGU.s5_s5_p1: Data automatically extracted from images (receipts, invoices) may contain errors. The User is responsible for verifying the accuracy of amounts, dates, supplier names, and other extracted data before incorporating them into accounting or operations.
CGU.s5_s6_p1: The Intelligence Score is an internal indicator reflecting the completeness of data entered in the Service. It does not constitute an actual performance measure of the establishment and should not be interpreted as an audit or professional evaluation.
CGU.s5_s7_p1: The Service runs periodic automated tasks, including:
CGU.s5_s7_l4: Sending retention alerts and operational notifications
CGU.s5_s7_p2: These automations run in the background and may be affected by third-party service availability. The User should not rely exclusively on automated results without verification.
CGU.s5_s8_p1: AI-generated publication drafts (captions, hashtags, formatting) are suggestions that require User review before publishing. Rive disclaims all liability for content published by the User on social media, even if initially suggested by the Service.
CGU.s6_s1_p1: Rive collects and processes personal data in accordance with Canada's Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Act 25), and, where applicable, the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
CGU.s6_s2_p1: The Service collects and processes the following categories of data:
CGU.s6_s2_l1: **Identification data** — Name, email address, establishment information
CGU.s6_s2_l2: **Operational data** — Service notes, temperature readings, menus, recipes, ingredients
CGU.s6_s2_l3: **Financial data** — Ingredient costs, margins, deposits, daily revenue, digitized invoices
CGU.s6_s2_l4: **Reservation data** — Cover volumes, time slots, cancellation rates (synchronized from third-party platforms)
CGU.s6_s2_l5: **Transaction data** — Sales by item, payment methods (synchronized from POS systems)
CGU.s6_s2_l6: **Consumption data** — Electricity and water meter readings
CGU.s6_s2_l7: **Loss data** — Variance records, waste, and inventory discrepancies
CGU.s6_s2_l8: **Multimedia content** — Dish photographs, receipt and invoice images
CGU.s6_s2_l9: **Usage data** — Service interactions, language preferences, connection logs
CGU.s6_s3_p1: User Data is securely stored on Supabase cloud infrastructure (Amazon Web Services). Data is encrypted at rest and in transit. The multi-tenant architecture ensures data isolation between establishments.
CGU.s6_s4_p1: Certain data is transmitted to third-party AI services (Anthropic) for processing (note analysis, OCR, content generation). Rive commits to minimizing personal data transmitted and using only data strictly necessary for the requested processing. These transfers are subject to the privacy policies of the relevant providers.
CGU.s6_s5_p1: Data synchronized from POS systems, reservation platforms, and social networks flows through the APIs of those services. Rive only accesses data necessary for the operation of enabled modules and does not store payment credentials of restaurants' end customers.
CGU.s6_s6_p1: In accordance with applicable legislation, the User has the following rights:
CGU.s6_s6_l1: **Right of access** — Obtain a copy of personal data
CGU.s6_s6_l2: **Right of rectification** — Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
CGU.s6_s6_l3: **Right of erasure** — Request deletion of personal data
CGU.s6_s6_l4: **Right to portability** — Receive data in a structured, machine-readable format
CGU.s6_s6_l5: **Right to object** — Object to data processing for specific purposes
CGU.s6_s6_l6: **Right to withdraw consent** — Withdraw consent to processing at any time
CGU.s6_s6_p2: To exercise these rights, the User may contact Rive at the address indicated in section 13.
CGU.s6_s7_p1: User Data is retained for the duration of the active subscription and for a period of 30 days following termination, to allow data export. After this period, data is irreversibly deleted, unless legally required to be retained.
CGU.s6_s8_p1: The User retains full ownership of all data entered, imported, or generated within the Service. Rive acquires no ownership rights over User Data.
CGU.s7_s1_p1: The Rive Service, including its source code, design, algorithms, documentation, and brand, is protected by Canadian and international intellectual property laws. Nothing in these terms grants the User any rights over these elements, other than the right of use within the scope of the subscription.
CGU.s7_s2_p1: The User retains all rights to content entered in the Service (notes, menus, recipes, images, financial data). The User grants Rive a limited, non-exclusive, revocable license to process this content solely for the purpose of providing the Service.
CGU.s7_s3_p1: Content generated by AI at the User's request (social media posts, summaries, translations, recommendations) is made available to the User for commercial use without restriction. Rive claims no intellectual property rights over such content.
CGU.s8_s1_p1: The Service is offered at the following tiers:
CGU.s8_s1_l1: **Free** — Logbook, menu editor, multilingual translation, social media hub
CGU.s8_s1_l2: **Essence** — Free features + food cost analysis, deposits, menu engineering
CGU.s8_s1_l3: **Performance** — Essence features + prep lists, reservations, variance tracking
CGU.s8_s1_l4: **Intelligence** — Performance features + accounting dashboard, advanced AI, utility costs
CGU.s8_s1_l5: **Enterprise** — Intelligence features + multi-location management, dedicated support, customization
CGU.s8_s1_p2: Rive reserves the right to modify subscription tier contents. Any changes affecting features included in a subscribed tier will be communicated with 30 days' notice.
CGU.s8_s2_p1: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually at the User's choice, through the secure payment platform Stripe. Prices are shown in Canadian dollars (CAD) unless otherwise stated. Applicable taxes are added to the displayed amount.
CGU.s8_s3_p1: Monthly subscriptions are non-refundable for the current period. For annual subscriptions, a prorated refund may be requested within 14 days of renewal. Beyond this period, no refund will be granted.
CGU.s8_s4_p1: The User may change subscription tier at any time from account settings. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades take effect at the start of the next billing period, with continued access to the higher tier's features until that date.
CGU.s9_s1_p1: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available." Rive does not guarantee that the Service will be error-free, uninterrupted, secure, or fit for a particular purpose.
CGU.s9_s2_p1: Under no circumstances shall Rive, its officers, employees, or contractors be held liable for:
CGU.s9_s2_l1: Financial losses resulting from inaccurate data generated by AI or extracted via OCR
CGU.s9_s2_l2: Regulatory penalties resulting from excessive reliance on Service suggestions
CGU.s9_s2_l3: Food or operational losses related to AI recommendations
CGU.s9_s2_l4: Inaccuracies in data synchronized from third-party integrations (POS, reservations)
CGU.s9_s2_l5: Content published by the User on social media, even if generated by the Service
CGU.s9_s2_l6: Service interruptions caused by third parties (host, AI providers, integrated platforms)
CGU.s9_s3_p1: Rive's total liability to the User is limited to the subscription fees actually paid by the User during the **twelve (12) months** preceding the event giving rise to the claim.
CGU.s9_s4_p1: Rive shall not be held liable for any failure resulting from force majeure, including without limitation: natural disasters, pandemics, conflicts, Internet infrastructure outages, third-party provider failures, or government actions.
CGU.s10_s1_p1: The User may cancel their subscription at any time through account settings or the Stripe billing portal. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
CGU.s10_s2_p1: Rive reserves the right to suspend or terminate a User's access in the event of a breach of these terms, abusive use of the Service, persistent non-payment, or any activity likely to harm the Service or other users. The User will be notified by email before any termination, except in emergencies.
CGU.s10_s3_p1: Upon termination, the User has a **30-day** period to export their data using the Service's export tools. After this period, data will be deleted in accordance with section 6.7. Rive commits to providing data in a structured, machine-readable format (CSV, JSON).
CGU.s10_s4_p1: Upon termination, all third-party integrations (POS systems, reservations, social media) are automatically disconnected. OAuth authentication tokens are revoked. The User is responsible for verifying that connections have been properly removed with the relevant third-party services.
CGU.s11_p1: Rive reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified of any material changes by email and in-app notification, with a minimum of **15 days'** notice before the new terms take effect.
CGU.s11_p2: Continued use of the Service after the new terms take effect constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
CGU.s11_p3: If the User disagrees with the modifications, they may cancel their subscription in accordance with section 10 before the new terms take effect.
CGU.s12_p1: These terms are governed by the laws of the Province of Quebec and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein.
CGU.s12_p2: Any dispute arising from these terms or the use of the Service shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Province of Quebec, District of Montreal.
CGU.s12_p3: In the event of a dispute, the parties agree to attempt an amicable resolution in good faith before resorting to litigation.
CGU.s13_p1: For any questions regarding these terms, the protection of your data, or the operation of the Service, please contact us at: **support@rivehub.com**

Meta.home_title: Rive — AI-Powered na Software sa Pamamahala ng Restaurant
Meta.home_description: Plataporma sa pamamahala ng restaurant gamit ang AI: HACCP compliance, matalinong logbook, food cost analysis, OCR invoice scanner, menu engineering, POS integration, pagsasalin sa 25 wika. Libreng bersyon available.
Meta.pricing_title: Presyo at Plano — Rive Software sa Pamamahala ng Restaurant
Meta.pricing_description: Subscription sa Rive mula $59/buwan. AI logbook, HACCP compliance, food cost tracking, POS integration (Toast, Square, Lightspeed), pagsasalin sa 25 wika. Libreng plano, walang kailangan na credit card.
Meta.cgu_description: Terms of service for Rive, the AI-powered restaurant management platform. AI policy, data protection, third-party integrations, and privacy commitments.
Meta.ai_page_title: AI para sa Pamamahala ng Restaurant — Rive
Meta.ai_page_description: Alamin kung paano ang AI para sa pamamahala ng restaurant ay nag-a-automate ng food cost, HACCP compliance, menu engineering, at pang-araw-araw na operasyon. Libreng AI restaurant platform — walang kailangan na credit card.

AIPage.meta_title: AI para sa Pamamahala ng Restaurant — Rive
AIPage.meta_description: Alamin kung paano ang AI para sa pamamahala ng restaurant ay nag-a-automate ng food cost, HACCP compliance, menu engineering, at pang-araw-araw na operasyon. Libreng AI restaurant platform — walang kailangan na credit card.
AIPage.hero_label: AI para sa Pamamahala ng Restaurant
AIPage.hero_title: Ang AI platform na ginawa para sa mga restaurant
AIPage.hero_description: Gumagamit ang Rive ng artificial intelligence para i-automate ang food cost tracking, HACCP compliance, menu engineering, at mga operational decision — para makapagpokus ka sa hospitality, hindi sa mga spreadsheet.
AIPage.what_title: Ano ang magagawa ng AI para sa iyong restaurant?
AIPage.what_description: Pinapalitan ng AI para sa pamamahala ng restaurant ang mga manual na proseso ng matalinong automation. Mula sa pag-scan ng mga invoice hanggang sa paghula ng mga pangangailangan sa paghahanda, narito kung paano binabago ng AI ang pang-araw-araw na operasyon.
AIPage.f1_desc: Sinusuri ng AI ang mga pattern ng serbisyo, temperature log, at staff notes para magbigay ng actionable insights — pinapalitan ang paper logs ng isang smart, searchable na rekord.
AIPage.f2_desc: Minomonitor ng AI ang mga compliance checkpoint, nifla-flag ang mga missing entry, at gumagawa ng audit-ready na mga report — pinapanatili ang iyong restaurant na safe at inspection-ready.
AIPage.f3_desc: I-track ang mga ingredient cost, i-detect ang mga price anomaly, at kalkulahin ang totoong margin per dish — kasama ang labor. Aalertuhan ka ng AI bago pa man sumobra ang mga gastos.
AIPage.f4_desc: Kumuha ng litrato o mag-upload ng PDF. Kine-extract ng AI ang bawat line item, produkto, quantity, at presyo — ginagawang segundo ang oras-oras na data entry.
AIPage.f5_desc: Tukuyin ang iyong pinakakapaki-pakinabang na mga dish gamit ang BCG matrix analysis. Nagrerekomenda ang AI ng mga pagbabago sa menu batay sa food cost, popularity, at margin data.
AIPage.f6_desc: Isinasalin ng AI ang mga task instruction, checklist, at menu para sa multilingual teams — tinitiyak na nauunawaan ng bawat team member ang kanilang papel nang perpekto.
AIPage.why_title: Bakit lumilipat ang mga restaurant sa AI
AIPage.why_description: Ang mga restaurant na gumagamit ng AI para sa pamamahala ay nag-uulat ng mas mabilis na mga desisyon, mas kaunting food waste, at mas matibay na compliance. Narito ang nagbabago kapag tumigil ka sa paghula at nagsimula ka nang malaman.
AIPage.b1_desc: Ino-automate ng AI ang invoice processing, compliance logging, at mga cost calculation na dating kumukonsumo ng buong shift. Gumagastos ang iyong team ng mas kaunting oras sa paperwork at mas maraming oras sa serbisyo.
AIPage.b2_desc: Tumutulong ang real-time cost tracking at waste detection sa mga restaurant na tukuyin at alisin ang mga nakatagong pagkalugi — madalas na nababawi ang halaga ng platform sa unang buwan pa lang.
AIPage.b3_desc: Ang tuloy-tuloy na HACCP monitoring ay nangangahulugang hindi ka na kailangang magmadali bago ang audit. Pinapanatili ng AI ang iyong compliance records na kumpleto, tama, at agad na ma-access.
AIPage.how_title: Paano inaaplika ng Rive ang AI sa iyong restaurant
AIPage.how_description: Hindi generic tool ang Rive na dinadagdagan lang ng AI. Bawat feature ay dinisenyo batay sa kung paano talaga nag-ooperate ang mga restaurant — mula sa kusina hanggang sa dining area.
AIPage.step1_desc: I-link ang iyong POS (Toast, Square, Lightspeed, SumUp, Zettle), mag-upload ng mga invoice, at imbitahan ang iyong team. Ang setup ay tumatagal nang wala pang 15 minuto.
AIPage.step2_title: Natututunan ng AI ang Iyong mga Pattern
AIPage.step2_desc: Sa loob ng 48 oras, naiintindihan na ng AI ng Rive ang iyong cost structure, service patterns, at compliance routines — at nagsisimula nang magbigay ng insights.
AIPage.step3_desc: Araw-araw na alerto sa food cost anomalies, automated compliance reports, menu profitability rankings, at predictive prep lists — lahat nang walang manual na input.
AIPage.step4_desc: Habang lumalaki ang iyong restaurant, lumalaki rin ang AI kasama mo — hina-handle ang maraming lokasyon, bagong team members, at tumataas na complexity nang walang karagdagang gastos.
AIPage.cta_title: Handa ka na bang dalhin ang AI sa iyong restaurant?
AIPage.cta_description: Sumama sa mga restaurant sa buong mundo na gumagamit ng Rive para i-automate ang mga operasyon, bawasan ang mga gastos, at mapanatili ang compliance — pinapagana ng artificial intelligence.
AIPage.cta_subtext: Walang kailangan na credit card. Libreng plano, habang-buhay.

Settings.title: Mga Setting
Settings.subtitle: Pamahalaan ang iyong mga kagustuhan, module, at team
Settings.placeholder_social_context: Hal.: Luxurious na tono, magsulat sa English na may Parisian vibe, laging gamitin ang 🍷 emoji at ang hashtag #GastroLife
Settings.desc_social_context: Gagamitin ng AI ang mga instruksyong ito para mag-generate ng iyong Instagram post gamit ang boses ng iyong brand.
Settings.team_desc: Mag-imbita ng iba para i-co-manage ang iyong restaurant. Bawat miyembro ay makakatanggap ng invitation link.
Settings.confirm_remove: Alisin ang miyembrong ito sa team?
Settings.modules_desc: I-enable o i-disable ang mga module sa iyong navigation bar.
Settings.module_menu_editor_desc: Menu CRUD, public mini-site, QR Code
Settings.module_food_cost_desc: Automatic na pagkalkula ng margin bawat pagkain
Settings.module_instagram_desc: AI post para sa iyong mga pagkain na may caption at hashtag
Settings.module_reservations_desc: Real-time na daloy ng iyong mga reservation mula sa iyong mga platform
Settings.module_smart_prep_desc: AI-based prep list mula sa iyong mga benta at reservation
Settings.integrations_desc: Ikonekta ang iyong mga reservation platform (Libro, Resy, atbp.) para i-unlock ang Smart Prep Lists (AI Prediction).
Settings.webhook_desc: Kopyahin ang link na ito at i-paste sa "Webhooks" setting ng iyong reservation software.
Settings.webhook_waiting: Naghihintay ng unang reservation para i-activate ang prediction...
Settings.trial_desc: Kasalukuyan kang nasa libreng trial o manual na sistema. Wala kang naka-configure na automated billing.
Settings.free_desc: Ginagamit mo ang libreng bersyon ng Rive. Mag-upgrade sa isang bayad na plan para i-unlock ang lahat ng feature.
Settings.labor_desc: Set your average hourly rate to calculate labor cost included in your Food Cost margins.
Settings.labor_help: This rate is used to calculate labor cost per portion: (prep time × rate) ÷ number of portions.
Settings.module_deposits_desc: I-track ang keg at bottle deposit nang hiwalay sa Food Cost.
Settings.module_variance_desc: Hanapin ang mga pagkakaiba sa pagitan ng POS expectation at physical inventory.
Settings.module_production_desc: I-track ang iyong mga beer batch mula fermentation hanggang keg.
Settings.cancel_dialog_desc: Please let us know why you are leaving. Your feedback is very important to us.
Settings.cancel_success: Your subscription has been cancelled. You will still have access until the end of your billing period.
Settings.cancel_error: An error occurred while cancelling your subscription. Please contact support.

WasteCalculator.title: Ano ang halaga ng kawalan ng kasiguraduhan?
WasteCalculator.subtitle: Ilagay ang iyong sariling numero para i-estimate ang iyong food waste
WasteCalculator.yearly_loss: ibig sabihin <value>{val}</value>/taon ang nawawala sa overproduction lamang
WasteCalculator.potential_reduction: Ang forecast management batay sa iyong data ay maaaring bawasan ang pagkawalang ito ng <value>{val}</value>/taon
WasteCalculator.disclaimer: Estimate batay sa {percent}% na waste reduction, naaayon sa data-driven forecast management study (WRAP, NRA). Ang aktwal na resulta ay depende sa iyong operational context.

LandingMockups.alert_text: Lumampas ang gastos sa seafood sa 30% threshold ngayong linggo. I-review ang iyong mga Salmon at Cod invoice.

SettingsIntegrations.title: Mga POS Connection
SettingsIntegrations.subtitle: Live synchronization & data import
SettingsIntegrations.error_no_key: Maglagay muna ng API key bago mag-save.
SettingsIntegrations.stripe_desc: I-sync ang sales volume mula sa iyong Stripe Checkout transaction at payment.
SettingsIntegrations.square_desc: Ikonekta ang iyong Square POS para automatic na mag-import ng weekly sales.
SettingsIntegrations.lightspeed_desc: I-link ang iyong Lightspeed Retail/Restaurant account.
SettingsIntegrations.toast_desc: Ikonekta ang iyong Toast system (M2M API) para mag-import ng weekly ticket.
SettingsIntegrations.sumup_desc: I-sync ang iyong matagumpay na SumUp payment history.
SettingsIntegrations.zettle_desc: I-import ang iyong iZettle transaction sa real time.

SettingsReservations.title: Mga Reservation Integration
SettingsReservations.subtitle: Ikonekta ang iyong native platform (Libro, Resy, Zenchef)
SettingsReservations.api_key_prompt: Ilagay ang iyong {name} API key. Mahahanap mo ito sa developer settings ng iyong {name} account.
SettingsReservations.auto_sync_desc: Automatic na history synchronization at bi-directional action.
SettingsReservations.resy_desc: Isa sa mga world leader sa reservation.

Success.title: Matagumpay ang Bayad
Success.subtitle: Salamat sa iyong tiwala. Na-activate na ang iyong subscription.
Success.description: Ang iyong mga bagong module ay naka-unlock na at handa nang gamitin. Mahahanap mo ang mga ito sa iyong navigation bar.
Success.login_needed: Mag-log in muna para tanggapin ang imbitasyon.
Success.login_prompt: Mag-log in o gumawa ng account, pagkatapos bumalik sa link na ito.

Intelligence.title: Aking Intelligence
Intelligence.subtitle: Natututo ang iyong sistema mula sa bawat data point na kinokonekta mo at bawat feedback na ibinibigay mo.
Intelligence.score_footer: Ito ang iyong katalinuhan, hindi amin.
Intelligence.milestone_operational_desc: Nakakonekta ang mga reservation, aktibo ang cover prediction.
Intelligence.milestone_predictive_desc: Nakakonekta ang POS — naka-unlock ang item-level prediction.
Intelligence.milestone_calibrated_desc: 7+ araw ng feedback — umaangkop ang sistema sa iyong realidad.
Intelligence.milestone_expert_desc: 4 na magkakasunod na linggo — naabot ang maximum accuracy.
Intelligence.hint_operational: Add your recipes to reach Predictive
Intelligence.hint_predictive: Give daily feedback to reach Calibrated

Reservations.title: Mga Reservation
Reservations.subtitle: Libro · Resy · Zenchef — Real-time na feed
Reservations.empty_no_platform_desc: Ikonekta ang Libro, Resy, o Zenchef para automatic na matanggap ang iyong mga reservation.
Reservations.confirm_delete_provider: Burahin ang koneksyong ito? Ang mga nauugnay na reservation ay mananatili.
Reservations.empty_no_reservations: Walang reservation para sa panahong ito.
Reservations.modal_description: Piliin ang iyong reservation software. Mag-ge-generate ang Rive ng natatanging Webhook link na kailangan mong i-paste sa setting ng iyong platform.

FoodCostAlerts.title: Rive AI: Mga Alert sa Profitability
FoodCostAlerts.empty_healthy_margins: Malusog ang iyong mga margin! Walang cost spike na na-detect ang AI sa iyong mga recipe.

Deposits.empty_description: Automatic na lalabas ang mga deposit dito kapag nag-scan ka ng invoice na may deposit line (keg, crate, atbp.).
Deposits.kpi_held_pending: {count} na deposit na naghihintay na ibalik
Deposits.inventory_subtitle: Mga deposit na na-extract mula sa iyong mga na-scan na invoice
Deposits.action_required_desc_after: na pending deposit. Ibalik ang mga ito para makuha ang credit sa susunod na order.
Deposits.ocr_description: Automatic na ine-extract ng Rive ang mga "Deposit" o "Consigne" line mula sa iyong mga na-scan na invoice para ihiwalay ang halagang ito mula sa iyong tunay na Food Cost / Pour Cost indicator.

Production.empty_description: Magsimula sa paggawa ng brewing recipe sa recipe editor, pagkatapos simulan ang iyong unang production dito.
Production.title: Batch Tracking

Variance.empty_description: Automatic na lalabas ang variance data pagkatapos ng iyong unang deposit at POS sales. I-cross-reference ng Rive ang iyong theoretical sales sa iyong actual inventory.
Variance.spoilage_justify: I-justify ang iyong mga pagkawala ("Spill" o "Comp")
Variance.kpi_loss_threshold: Mga pagkawala na higit sa $20 / item

InvoiceScanner.title: Bagong Invoice Scan
InvoiceScanner.subtitle: I-drag ang larawan ng invoice. Automatic na ia-update ng AI ang iyong mga presyo ng sangkap.
InvoiceScanner.dropzone_title: Mag-click o Mag-drag ng file dito
InvoiceScanner.dropzone_formats: Mga sinusuportahang format: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, PDF.
InvoiceScanner.dropzone_tip: Tip: Sa mobile, maaari kang kumuha ng larawan nang direkta.
InvoiceScanner.ready_title: Handa na para sa AI extraction
InvoiceScanner.ready_desc: I-extract namin ang supplier, kabuuan, at ima-map ang bawat product line sa iyong lokal na inventory.
InvoiceScanner.more_items: + {count} pang item na pinoproseso sa background
InvoiceScanner.error_unsupported_format: Hindi sinusuportahang format. Mag-upload ng larawan o maikling PDF.
InvoiceScanner.error_scan_failed: Error sa pag-scan (maaaring masyadong malaki ang file)
InvoiceScanner.error_analysis_generic: Nagkaroon ng error sa panahon ng analysis.

SmartPrep.title: Smart Prep List
SmartPrep.subtitle: Natututo ang iyong sistema mula sa iyong mga reservation, benta, at feedback
SmartPrep.empty_no_reservations: Walang nahanap na reservation para sa petsang ito
SmartPrep.empty_connect_platforms: Ikonekta ang iyong mga reservation platform para i-activate ang prediction.
SmartPrep.card_based_on_recipes: Batay sa mga naka-configure na recipe
SmartPrep.ingredients_unlock_hint: Idagdag ang iyong mga recipe sa Food Cost module para i-unlock ang Level 3.
SmartPrep.feedback_already_submitted: Naisumite na ang feedback para sa prep list na ito
SmartPrep.feedback_adjustments_integrated: Ang mga adjustment ay naisama na sa mga susunod na prediction.
SmartPrep.feedback_desc: I-adjust ang aktwal na portion para sa bawat item. Ang mga binagong item lamang ang makakaapekto sa mga susunod na prediction.
SmartPrep.level_1_hint: Ikonekta ang iyong POS para maabot ang Level 2
SmartPrep.level_2_hint: Idagdag ang iyong mga recipe para maabot ang Level 3
SmartPrep.level_3_hint: Lahat ng data source ay nakakonekta

Invite.success_access: You now have access to the restaurant dashboard.
Invite.login_needed: Please log in to accept the invitation.
Invite.login_prompt: Log in or create an account, then come back to this link.
Invite.error_network: Network error. Please try again later.

HealthScore.title: Health Score
HealthScore.no_score_desc: Get a comprehensive view of your restaurant's operational health and online visibility in a single score.
HealthScore.unlock_visibility_desc: Link your Google Business Profile to see your online visibility, review sentiment, and how you compare to nearby competitors.
